name: reporting-engine
description: Clara component for chart capability manifests, dataset profiling, source-backed semantic-layer contracts, mechanical compatibility evidence, adapter resolution, and unified rendering.

interface.shortDescription: Expose chart contracts, dataset profiles, reviewed semantic layers, compatibility evidence, and rendering for Clara reports.
interface.longDescription: A Clara-embedded reporting contract component. It packages the reviewed chart-selection manifest, gallery artifact metadata, role registry, dataset-profile examples, mechanical compatibility audits, render-proof matrix, family selector playbooks, Clara adapter registry, and a dataset-specific semantic-layer schema and workflow. Local scripts profile datasets, create explicitly unreviewed semantic scaffolds, package model-facing authoring context, validate source and role bindings, resolve capabilities to reporting-engine adapter ids, and render a chosen capability through the embedded family component. This component is not an orchestrator: a model or human owns semantic truth, and deterministic validation proves contract coherence only.
defaultPrompt: Use Reporting Engine to inspect chart capabilities and dataset mechanical compatibility.
Profile the dataset and create or load its source-backed semantic layer before making semantic claims.
Validate semantic and mechanical contracts; coherent wiring is not proof of semantic truth or automatic chart selection.
